tasks.prompt: Execute o slash command /rs (repo-scan) para escanear o repositório. Use o output para gerar/actualizar tasks/pipeline.json com tasks pendentes. Liste as 3 tasks mais prioritárias. Resuma em 2-3 linhas.

SRE Monitor: Run /srv/monorepo/.claude/skills/coolify-sre/scripts/sre-monitor.sh to check Coolify apps, Docker containers, health endpoints, resource usage, and subdomain tunnel status. Auto-heal degraded/down containers (whitelist only). Log results. Replaces old auto-healer (8812f46c) and resource-monitor (4cb53930).
Code review daily: Run /review on recent commits and changes. Generate REVIEW-*.md reports in docs/SPECS/reviews/ and submit via gh or save findings.

Execute vibe-kit autonomous workers:
1. Check if vibe-kit.sh or master-launcher.sh is running
2. If not running, start it in background with nohup
3. If queue has pending tasks and workers < 5, launch new workers via master-launcher.sh
4. Log to /srv/monorepo/.claude/brain-refactor/logs/cron-workers.log

Working directory: /srv/monorepo/.claude/brain-refactor
Queue: queue.json
Lock: .master-launcher.lock

Monitor brain-refactor vibe loop progress:
1. Read /srv/monorepo/.claude/brain-refactor/queue.json
2. Count: total, done, running, pending, failed tasks
3. Check for stale running tasks (started > 2h ago but not completed)
4. Log summary to /srv/monorepo/.claude/brain-refactor/logs/cron-monitor.log
5. If > 5 stale tasks, restart the worker loop
6. Report: tasks done/total, running workers, any issues
